info.title: @digipair/skill-serialport
info.description: Communicate with devices via serial port (write data and send commands)

post.description: Write data to a serial port device without waiting for response

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The data to write to the serial port (array of bytes or buffer)

parameters.name: sleep
parameters.description: Time to wait in milliseconds after writing (default: 1000)

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Serial port configuration (optional, uses SERIALPORT_CONFIG from context if not provided)

schema.description: Empty response object indicating successful write

post.description: Send a command to a serial port device and wait for response

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The command data to send to the serial port (array of bytes or buffer)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of read operation to determine end of response (default: 'delimiter')

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value associated with the read type (number of bytes to read for 'size' or ASCII code of delimiter for 'delimiter', default: 10 for '\n')

parameters.name: sleep
parameters.description: Time to wait in milliseconds after sending command (default: 1000)

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum time to wait for response in milliseconds (default: 3000)

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Serial port configuration (optional, uses SERIALPORT_CONFIG from context if not provided)

200.description: Response data received from serial port device

schema.description: Array of bytes received as response from the device
